tuning: E A D G B E
content:
lots of versions on here, and I will agree that capo 2nd 
ones sound great, however this is without the capo

intro:

  in F#m

the ^ indicates to start bent up to sound like that fret
and then release the bend to finish on the actual fret

[tab]e----------------------------------------------|
B----------------------------------------------|
G----------------------------------------------|
D--9^7-------7-9---10^9---10^9--7--6-----------|
A----6---7-9-------------------------7---7h9---|
E--------------------------------------9-------|[/tab]

[tab]e------------------------------------|
B------------------------------------|
G------------------------------------|
D-------7-9---10^9---10^9--7--6------|
A---7-9-------------------------9-9--|
E------------------------------------|[/tab]


[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
      If I fall along the way[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]F#m[/ch]
      Pick me up and dust me off[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Bm[/ch]
      and if I get too tired to make it[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                           [ch]F#m[/ch]
      be my breath so I can walk[/tab]

[tab]                           [ch]Bm[/ch]
      If I need some other love[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                             [ch]F#m[/ch]
      give me more than I can stand[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]Bm[/ch]
      and when my smile gets old and faded[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch]
      wait around I'll smile again[/tab]

[tab]                [ch]A/G#[/ch]        [ch]F#m[/ch]
      shouldn't be so complicated[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
      just hold me and then[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]E[/ch]
      just hold me again[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
      can you help me I'm bent[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]D[/ch]
      I'm so scared that I'll never[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]E[/ch]
      get put back together[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]A[/ch]
      you're breaking me in[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]F#m[/ch]
      and this is how we will end[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
      with you and me    bent[/tab]

 A----------
 E----5--4--[/tab]

      start bending me[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]B7/D#[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]
      Keep bending me until I'm completely broken in[/tab]
